product_name: FPV F680 carbon-fiber folding hexacopter frame
exact_spec: 680 mm wheelbase carbon frame with folding arms and landing gear
notes: Budget target only. Confirm the motor bolt pattern, arm diameter, and delivered mass before ordering.

exact_spec: 6S-capable 3508 class motors; 380KV is the practical near-350KV choice for 12 inch props on an F680
notes: Do not use 5010 360KV motors with 15 inch props on this 680 mm hex frame; adjacent prop clearance is likely inadequate. Buy all six from one seller and verify CW/CCW shaft hardware.

exact_spec: Individual ESC with DShot support and at least 40A continuous rating
notes: Use six individual ESCs. Bench-test each motor ESC pair before mounting.

exact_spec: 12x5.5 inch CW/CCW pairs; three installed pairs plus one spare pair
notes: 12 inch props are the conservative fit for an F680 hex. Balance props and confirm at least 10 mm adjacent tip clearance.

exact_spec: Owned STM32H743 flight controller; flash current ArduPilot target MATEKH743
notes: Reuse the owned controller. Confirm six motor outputs and safety switch behavior with props removed.

exact_spec: Owned M8N GPS plus QMC5883L compass; UART and I2C
notes: Reuse only after compass and GPS bench checks. Mount on a mast away from power wiring.

exact_spec: 2S-12S six-ESC power distribution board with current sensing
notes: Use an XT60 or XT90 input selected from measured current. Add the supplied low-ESR capacitor at the PDB input.

exact_spec: 6S-capable regulated 5V supply for Pi and USB payloads
notes: Do not power the Pi and depth camera from the flight controller 5V rail. Keep grounds common at the PDB.

product_name: RadioMaster Pocket ELRS and RP1 receiver
exact_spec: 2.4 GHz ExpressLRS transmitter plus RP1 receiver
notes: Required independent pilot override. Configure arm, flight mode, and RTL or Land switches before flight.

exact_spec: 22.2V flight pack with XT60 or XT90 connector matched to PDB
notes: One pack keeps the BOM under budget. Add a second identical pack only after flight-time testing.

exact_spec: AC/DC balance charger rated for 6S and at least 5A
notes: Use a balance board only if compatible and never charge unattended.

product_name: Intel RealSense D415 used or refurbished
exact_spec: USB 3 active-stereo RGB-D camera; budget cap for used unit and cable
notes: Intel D415 is discontinued and used pricing varies. Use it for close-range depth and obstacle experiments, not reliable long-range wildfire sensing or safety-critical avoidance.

exact_spec: Low-resolution I2C thermal array; 55 or 110 degree field of view
notes: Demo and close-range heat-screening only. It is not a radiometric wildfire camera and must not trigger autonomous fire response.

exact_spec: 1080p USB camera for RGB confirmation and recording
notes: Use the USB camera because the owned Pi CSI port is unavailable.

exact_spec: Owned companion computer running vision and MAVLink software
notes: Power from the dedicated 5V 5A UBEC. Use a powered USB hub only if measured USB load requires it.

exact_spec: 12 AWG main wire; 14 to 18 AWG branch wire; bullets; XT60 or XT90; heat shrink; fuse; capacitor; cable sleeve
notes: Use strain relief at carbon edges and test continuity before connecting the LiPo.

product_name: GPS mast sensor housings and anti-vibration hardware
exact_spec: PETG or ASA mounts; soft flight-controller mount; standoffs; cable ties
notes: Do not use PLA for flight-critical mounts. Keep barometer foam protected from prop wash.

exact_spec: 32GB for flight logs and 64GB for Pi field data
notes: Use known-good cards and verify log writing before every field test.

exact_spec: 5V active buzzer plus external arming or safety switch
notes: A loud arm-state indicator is mandatory for bench work.

exact_spec: Spare M3 hardware; locknuts; threadlocker; prop adapters; one extra prop pair allowance
notes: Use manufacturer-approved motor fasteners with correct thread engagement.

product_name: Shipping tax and price variation reserve
exact_spec: Small reserve for shipping and marketplace price movement
notes: Keep this reserve intact until all flight-critical parts are received and inspected.

product_name: Complete F680 hexacopter with owned H743-WLITE BN-880 and Pi reused
notes: Under $1000 before any local tax or import duty. The D415 line requires a used/refurbished purchase at or below $80.
